what_it_does: Records metadata for a single design-assets icon image (PNG) in the channel ledger, including blob reference, dimensions, authorship, version history, and alt text.
observations: Ledger entry for an image asset named 'image (50)' under channel 'design-assets' path 'icons/image (50)'.
Width and height are both recorded as 0.
The alt text for version 1 is empty.
There are no links and only one version.
Author session is ch-3mpkjg3r and source is dragnet.
standouts: Dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image asset.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file for structured asset metadata.
Follows the ledger schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, timestamps, version history, and links.
concerns: Zero width/height may indicate missing image analysis or a placeholder.
Empty alt text limits accessibility metadata.
notes: This is a minimal, single-version icon asset record with placeholder-like dimensions and no descriptive alt text.
questions: Why are width and height 0 for an image?
What does the asset name 'image (50)' signify?
Is the empty alt text intentional or awaiting annotation?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a design-assets icon image; it does store the catalog metadata, but the 0x0 dimensions and empty alt suggest the catalog entry is incomplete.
intention_signals: To register a PNG icon in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced, versioned, and discovered by the ledger system.
contribution: Provides a concrete, versioned image asset record with blob identity and authorship, which a fused system can use as a stable reference point for the icon.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata record for a single PNG icon named 'image (50)' in the design-assets/icons channel, referencing blob b2:67c51ed93d02935c2de2e1a6ea31ceac with 0x0 dimensions and empty alt text.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a design-assets icon image for reference and retrieval.
